version.description: Policy schema version. Only version 1 is supported.

profiles.description: Named certificate profiles. Keys are profile names referenced by hosts and agents.

type.description: wildcard issues a *.domain.com certificate and requires dns-01. multi_san issues a certificate with explicit SANs.

dns_names.description: Allowed DNS names for this profile.

challenge.description: ACME challenge type. Wildcard profiles require dns-01.

credentials.description: Secret name resolved by the configured secrets provider.

renew_before.description: The broker renews a cached certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.

hosts.description: Registered hosts. Keys are human-readable host labels.

identity.description: The Common Name of this host's identity certificate as issued by step-ca.

profiles.description: Profiles this host is allowed to request. Requests for any other profile are rejected.
